title: Heartbeat
description: Device -> engine liveness ping, published to neuraroute/heartbeat every ~1.5 s. v2: liveness only — no cpu/npu/battery telemetry (the ladder routes on reachability, not load).

models.description: ops this device can run (v2: ["triage"] (+ echo))

privacy_ok.description: true if patient data may be processed here (on-device); false for cloud
